query: SELECT q.id, q.moduleId, q.titleFr, q.passingScore, COUNT(qq.id) as question_count FROM quizzes q LEFT JOIN quiz_questions qq ON qq.quizId = q.id GROUP BY q.id ORDER BY q.moduleId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user M2p26uMeyZfN57L.7f2cda2e67ce --database S5Kvdsbv47gJwCwLVS8V8T --execute SELECT q.id, q.moduleId, q.titleFr, q.passingScore, COUNT(qq.id) as question_count FROM quizzes q LEFT JOIN quiz_questions qq ON qq.quizId = q.id GROUP BY q.id ORDER BY q.moduleId;
